compiled.ai_exposure_detail: GitHub Copilot and ChatGPT assist in writing Solidity contracts, generating ERC-20/ERC-721 boilerplate, and creating deployment scripts. ChatGPT helps debug transaction failures, analyse gas optimisation, and explain complex cryptographic primitives. AI tools assist in generating test suites for smart contracts using Hardhat and Foundry frameworks.
compiled.human_value_tasks: Blockchain developers conduct smart contract security audits to identify reentrancy, overflow, and access control vulnerabilities — high-stakes work where AI-generated code frequently introduces exploitable bugs. They design token economics and governance models that balance incentives across diverse stakeholder groups, requiring economic reasoning and game theory knowledge. Navigating India's evolving VDA (Virtual Digital Asset) regulatory framework requires up-to-date legal and compliance awareness.
compiled.narrative_para1: A junior Blockchain Developer at an Indian Web3 startup or enterprise blockchain project spends their week writing and testing Solidity smart contracts for Ethereum or Polygon, deploying contracts to testnets using Hardhat or Foundry, and integrating smart contracts with frontend applications via ethers.js or web3.js. Daily tasks include writing unit tests for contract functions, debugging failed transactions using block explorers like Polygonscan, reviewing gas consumption for contract optimisation, and integrating with wallets such as MetaMask. In enterprise contexts, they may work on Hyperledger Fabric or Quorum networks for permissioned blockchain use cases in supply chain or trade finance. Given India's evolving VDA regulatory landscape post the 2022 crypto tax rules, developers also track SEBI and RBI circulars for compliance implications.
compiled.narrative_para2: With 50% AI exposure, this role is actively AI-Evolving. GitHub Copilot and ChatGPT assist in writing Solidity contracts, generating ERC-20 and ERC-721 boilerplate, and creating deployment scripts. ChatGPT helps debug transaction failures, analyse gas optimisation, and explain complex cryptographic primitives. AI tools assist in generating test suites for smart contracts using Hardhat and Foundry frameworks. However, blockchain developers conduct smart contract security audits to identify reentrancy, overflow, and access control vulnerabilities — high-stakes work where AI-generated code frequently introduces exploitable bugs. They design token economics and governance models balancing incentives across diverse stakeholder groups, requiring economic reasoning and game theory knowledge. Navigating India's evolving VDA (Virtual Digital Asset) regulatory framework requires up-to-date legal and compliance awareness. The tools currently reshaping this role include GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, and Tabnine — each accelerating routine work while leaving the most complex, context-dependent decisions firmly in human hands.
compiled.narrative_para3: B.Tech or MCA graduates with strong JavaScript or Python fundamentals and curiosity about cryptographic systems are well positioned. Comfort with command-line tools, testing discipline for security-critical smart contract code, and awareness of blockchain economics are important traits. Starting at Rs.5-9 lakh, salaries grow to Rs.10-18 lakh at 2-3 years, Rs.18-30 lakh at senior developer level, and Rs.30-65 lakh (VERIFY) for blockchain architects and protocol engineers. Certified Blockchain Developer (CBDE — VERIFY) and Ethereum developer certifications are available. A strong portfolio of audited, deployed smart contracts is the most effective hiring signal. Eligible programme levels: UG, PG.

compiled.ai_exposure_detail: Amazon Q Developer assists with AWS-specific IaC generation, security configuration auditing, and architecture optimisation recommendations. GitHub Copilot accelerates Terraform module writing, cloud-init scripts, and policy document generation. AI tools increasingly help identify cost anomalies and suggest rightsizing recommendations in cloud environments.
compiled.human_value_tasks: Cloud engineers design multi-region architectures that balance resilience, latency, compliance, and cost — decisions requiring business context and risk judgement. They negotiate enterprise cloud contracts, architect data residency solutions for Indian regulatory requirements (RBI, SEBI data localisation), and advise on cloud migration strategies. Security architecture decisions affecting customer data require human accountability.
compiled.narrative_para1: A junior Cloud Engineer at an Indian tech company or IT services firm spends their week provisioning and managing cloud infrastructure on AWS, Azure, or GCP using Terraform or CloudFormation, configuring VPCs, security groups, IAM roles, and S3 buckets following least-privilege principles. Daily tasks include monitoring cloud costs and setting budget alerts, supporting application teams with cloud resource requests, managing container workloads on EKS or AKS, and responding to infrastructure incidents. They implement automated patching and compliance checks, support RBI or SEBI data residency requirements for BFSI clients, and assist in cloud migration assessments for legacy on-premise systems being moved to cloud.
compiled.narrative_para2: With 55% AI exposure, this role is actively AI-Evolving. Amazon Q Developer assists with AWS-specific IaC generation, security configuration auditing, and architecture optimisation recommendations. GitHub Copilot accelerates Terraform module writing, cloud-init scripts, and policy document generation. AI tools increasingly help identify cost anomalies and suggest rightsizing recommendations in cloud environments. However, cloud engineers design multi-region architectures that balance resilience, latency, compliance, and cost — decisions requiring business context and risk judgement. They architect data residency solutions for Indian regulatory requirements such as RBI and SEBI data localisation mandates and advise on cloud migration strategies. Security architecture decisions affecting customer data require human accountability. The tools currently reshaping this role include Amazon Q Developer (formerly AWS CodeWhisperer), GitHub Copilot, and ChatGPT — each accelerating routine work while leaving the most complex, context-dependent decisions firmly in human hands.
compiled.narrative_para3: B.Tech or MCA graduates with foundational Linux and networking knowledge are well positioned. Those who enjoy infrastructure problem-solving, cost optimisation puzzles, and are comfortable with multi-service cloud ecosystems will thrive. Starting at Rs.4.5-8 lakh, salaries grow to Rs.10-16 lakh at 2-3 years, Rs.16-26 lakh at senior cloud engineer level, and Rs.26-55 lakh for cloud architects. AWS Certified Solutions Architect and Azure Administrator certifications are the most effective salary accelerators in this field. Eligible programme levels: UG, PG.

compiled.human_value_tasks: Full stack developers integrate disparate systems, balance performance trade-offs across frontend and backend, and make product-aligned architectural choices that AI cannot assess without deep business context. They own the end-to-end delivery of features including deployment, monitoring, and incident response. Debugging cross-layer issues — where a frontend behaviour is caused by a backend race condition — requires holistic system thinking.
compiled.narrative_para1: A junior Full Stack Developer at an Indian product startup or digital agency spends their week building both frontend React.js components and backend Node.js or Python APIs, connecting them to PostgreSQL or MongoDB databases. Daily tasks include designing and consuming REST APIs, debugging issues that span frontend and server layers, writing database queries, and deploying features through GitHub Actions or Vercel. They participate in sprint planning, estimate development effort, and coordinate with UI/UX designers to implement pixel-accurate interfaces. In Indian SaaS companies, they often work across the full feature stack — from database schema changes to the final rendered UI — with minimal handoffs.
compiled.narrative_para2: With 60% AI exposure, this role is actively AI-Evolving. v0 by Vercel generates full React component scaffolding from natural language, dramatically accelerating frontend development. GitHub Copilot assists across both frontend and backend codebases, completing boilerplate and suggesting API integrations. ChatGPT supports architecture decisions, SQL query generation, and debugging complex stack traces. However, full stack developers integrate disparate systems, balance performance trade-offs across frontend and backend, and make product-aligned architectural choices that AI cannot assess without deep business context. They own the end-to-end delivery of features including deployment, monitoring, and incident response. Debugging cross-layer issues — where a frontend behaviour is caused by a backend race condition — requires holistic system thinking. The tools currently reshaping this role include GitHub Copilot, v0 by Vercel, and ChatGPT — each accelerating routine work while leaving the most complex, context-dependent decisions firmly in human hands.
compiled.narrative_para3: B.Tech, BCA, or MCA graduates with hands-on project experience across both frontend and backend are the core fit. Those who enjoy end-to-end product ownership and are comfortable context-switching between UI logic and server-side concerns will excel. Starting at Rs.4-7 lakh, salaries grow to Rs.8-14 lakh at 2-3 years, Rs.14-22 lakh at senior level, and Rs.22-45 lakh for tech leads. A strong portfolio of deployed projects — visible on GitHub or live URLs — is the most effective differentiator. Eligible programme levels: UG, PG.

compiled.ai_exposure_detail: GitHub Copilot and ChatGPT generate firmware code, cloud integration scripts, and AWS IoT Core rule configurations. Amazon Q Developer assists with AWS IoT device management and Greengrass component development. AI tools help interpret sensor datasheet protocols and generate device shadow handling code.
compiled.human_value_tasks: IoT developers physically commission and debug device fleets in field environments — warehouses, factories, agricultural fields — where remote debugging is insufficient and hands-on troubleshooting is essential. They design power-efficient firmware for battery-operated devices that must operate for years without maintenance, requiring hardware-specific optimisation beyond AI's code generation capability. Security architecture decisions for devices that cannot be easily patched post-deployment require careful upfront human design.
compiled.narrative_para1: A junior IoT Developer at an Indian smart device startup, industrial automation company, or agritech firm spends their week writing firmware for ESP32 or Raspberry Pi-based devices, integrating sensors (temperature, humidity, GPS, accelerometer) with cloud platforms like AWS IoT Core or Azure IoT Hub, and building backend services to process device telemetry data. Daily tasks include configuring MQTT message brokers, writing Python scripts for edge data preprocessing using AWS Greengrass, debugging device connectivity issues in field environments, and maintaining device management dashboards. They coordinate with hardware engineers on PCB design reviews and work with mobile developers on companion app integrations. Indian smart agriculture, smart manufacturing, and smart city projects create active demand for IoT developers comfortable across both firmware and cloud layers.
compiled.narrative_para2: With 40% AI exposure, this role is actively AI-Evolving. GitHub Copilot and ChatGPT generate firmware code, cloud integration scripts, and AWS IoT Core rule configurations. Amazon Q Developer assists with AWS IoT device management and Greengrass component development. AI tools help interpret sensor datasheet protocols and generate device shadow handling code. However, ioT developers physically commission and debug device fleets in field environments — warehouses, factories, agricultural fields — where remote debugging is insufficient and hands-on troubleshooting is essential. They design power-efficient firmware for battery-operated devices that must operate for years without maintenance, requiring hardware-specific optimisation. Security architecture decisions for devices that cannot be easily patched post-deployment require careful upfront human design. The tools currently reshaping this role include GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, and Amazon Q Developer (formerly AWS CodeWhisperer) — each accelerating routine work while leaving the most complex, context-dependent decisions firmly in human hands.
compiled.narrative_para3: B.Tech in CS, ECE, or EEE graduates with interest in both hardware and cloud development are well positioned. Those who enjoy solving problems across the full IoT stack — from sensor interfacing to cloud dashboards — and are comfortable with field deployment challenges will thrive. Starting at Rs.3.5-6 lakh, salaries grow to Rs.7-12 lakh at 2-3 years, Rs.12-20 lakh at senior developer level, and Rs.20-40 lakh for IoT architects. AWS IoT certification and hands-on hardware project portfolios are strong differentiators. Eligible programme levels: UG, PG.

compiled.ai_exposure_detail: GitHub Copilot accelerates Flutter widget trees, Kotlin coroutines boilerplate, and Swift UI components. ChatGPT supports integration of third-party SDKs, resolving platform-specific build errors, and generating localisation strings. AI tools are widely used for generating unit tests for ViewModels and business logic layers in mobile codebases.
compiled.human_value_tasks: Mobile app developers optimise for platform-specific behaviours, device fragmentation, and battery/memory constraints that AI cannot contextualise fully. They navigate App Store and Play Store review guidelines, handle push notification flows, and implement biometric authentication with platform-specific nuances. Designing offline-first architectures and handling poor network connectivity in Indian market contexts requires domain experience.
compiled.narrative_para1: A junior Mobile App Developer at an Indian startup or digital product company spends their week building features in Flutter or Kotlin for Android, and occasionally Swift for iOS, writing UI components, integrating REST APIs, and managing local state using Provider or Riverpod. Daily tasks include handling device permissions, integrating Firebase for push notifications and analytics, testing on multiple Android screen sizes and API levels, and submitting builds through the Google Play Console. Indian app developers frequently account for low-bandwidth environments, feature phone form factors, and regional language support. They coordinate with backend developers on API contracts and with QA engineers to reproduce device-specific bugs before release.
compiled.narrative_para2: With 55% AI exposure, this role is actively AI-Evolving. GitHub Copilot accelerates Flutter widget trees, Kotlin coroutines boilerplate, and SwiftUI components. ChatGPT supports integration of third-party SDKs, resolving platform-specific build errors, and generating localisation strings. AI tools are widely used for generating unit tests for ViewModels and business logic layers in mobile codebases. However, mobile app developers optimise for platform-specific behaviours, device fragmentation, and battery and memory constraints that AI cannot contextualise fully. They navigate App Store and Play Store review guidelines, handle push notification flows, and implement biometric authentication with platform-specific nuances. Designing offline-first architectures and handling poor network connectivity in Indian market contexts requires domain experience. The tools currently reshaping this role include GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, and Tabnine — each accelerating routine work while leaving the most complex, context-dependent decisions firmly in human hands.
compiled.narrative_para3: B.Tech, BCA, or MCA graduates with hands-on Flutter or Kotlin experience are well positioned. Those who enjoy building polished end-user experiences, care about app performance and battery life, and are patient with platform-specific idiosyncrasies will thrive. Starting at Rs.3.5-6 lakh, salaries grow to Rs.7-13 lakh at 2-3 years, Rs.13-22 lakh at senior developer level, and Rs.22-40 lakh for mobile tech leads. Published apps on Play Store or App Store are a strong portfolio signal. Eligible programme levels: UG, PG.

compiled.ai_exposure_detail: ChatGPT and Microsoft Copilot assist in drafting network configuration scripts, generating firewall rule documentation, and researching CVEs for network equipment. AI-powered network monitoring tools automate anomaly detection and alert correlation, reducing manual log review. AI assists in generating network topology documentation and change management records.
compiled.human_value_tasks: Network administrators make real-time decisions during network outages that affect business continuity, requiring rapid problem-solving under pressure. They design network segmentation, firewall policies, and access control lists that balance security with business usability in ways requiring contextual judgement. Vendor negotiations, ISP escalations, and infrastructure change management require human relationship skills and accountability.
compiled.narrative_para1: A junior Network Administrator at an Indian enterprise, IT services company, or data centre spends their week managing Cisco and Juniper switches and routers, configuring VLANs, and monitoring network uptime through tools like SolarWinds or PRTG. Daily tasks include managing DNS and DHCP configurations, troubleshooting connectivity issues reported by end users, updating firewall rules in line with change management processes, and maintaining network diagrams and asset registers. They support Wi-Fi access point management, VPN configurations for remote users, and ISP link failover setups. In Indian enterprises, network administrators often manage hybrid environments combining on-premise infrastructure with Azure or AWS connectivity through Direct Connect or ExpressRoute circuits.
compiled.narrative_para2: With 30% AI exposure, this role is actively AI-Evolving. ChatGPT and Microsoft Copilot assist in drafting network configuration scripts, generating firewall rule documentation, and researching CVEs for network equipment. AI-powered network monitoring tools automate anomaly detection and alert correlation, reducing manual log review. AI assists in generating network topology documentation and change management records. However, network administrators make real-time decisions during network outages that affect business continuity, requiring rapid problem-solving under pressure. They design network segmentation, firewall policies, and access control lists that balance security with business usability. Vendor negotiations, ISP escalations, and infrastructure change management require human relationship skills and accountability. The tools currently reshaping this role include ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot, and Perplexity AI — each accelerating routine work while leaving the most complex, context-dependent decisions firmly in human hands.
compiled.narrative_para3: B.Tech, BCA, or Diploma in Networking graduates are well positioned. Those who are methodical, comfortable with hardware-level troubleshooting, and can stay calm during network outages will thrive. This is predominantly an on-site role given the physical infrastructure dependency. Starting at Rs.3-5 lakh, salaries grow to Rs.6-10 lakh at 2-3 years, Rs.10-16 lakh at senior level, and Rs.16-28 lakh for network architects. CCNA and CCNP certifications are the primary career progression credentials in this field. Eligible programme levels: UG, PG.

compiled.ai_exposure_detail: GitHub Copilot and ChatGPT generate Selenium/Cypress test scripts from user story descriptions, significantly reducing test authoring time. AI tools assist in generating edge case test data, creating API mock configurations, and writing BDD step definitions. AI-powered test generation is emerging for visual regression testing and exploratory test suggestions.
compiled.human_value_tasks: QA engineers apply domain knowledge and user empathy to identify edge cases and real-world usage scenarios that automated generation misses. They assess risk-based test prioritisation, balancing coverage with release velocity in ways that require business context. Root cause analysis of flaky tests, environment-specific failures, and third-party integration issues requires investigative skills AI cannot replicate.
compiled.narrative_para1: A junior QA Engineer at an Indian software company spends their week writing and executing manual test cases, creating automated test scripts in Selenium or Cypress, and logging bugs in Jira with detailed reproduction steps. Daily tasks include testing API endpoints with Postman, performing regression testing before releases, participating in sprint demos, and coordinating with developers on bug fixes. They maintain test plans aligned to user stories, run smoke and sanity tests on staging environments, and support UAT by preparing test data. Indian service companies often require QA engineers to work across functional, regression, performance (JMeter), and API testing tracks simultaneously, making breadth of testing knowledge essential.
compiled.narrative_para2: With 55% AI exposure, this role is actively AI-Evolving. GitHub Copilot and ChatGPT generate Selenium and Cypress test scripts from user story descriptions, significantly reducing test authoring time. AI tools assist in generating edge case test data, creating API mock configurations, and writing BDD step definitions. AI-powered test generation is emerging for visual regression testing and exploratory test suggestions. However, qA engineers apply domain knowledge and user empathy to identify edge cases and real-world usage scenarios that automated generation misses. They assess risk-based test prioritisation, balancing coverage with release velocity in ways that require business context. Root cause analysis of flaky tests, environment-specific failures, and third-party integration issues requires investigative skills AI cannot replicate. The tools currently reshaping this role include GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, and Tabnine — each accelerating routine work while leaving the most complex, context-dependent decisions firmly in human hands.
compiled.narrative_para3: B.Tech, BCA, or MCA graduates are the core fit. Those with systematic thinking, curiosity to break things, and patience with repetitive testing cycles will find the role fulfilling. Starting at Rs.3-5 lakh, salaries grow to Rs.6-10 lakh at 2-3 years, Rs.10-17 lakh at senior QA level, and Rs.17-30 lakh for QA leads and test architects. ISTQB certification is a widely recognised qualifier. Shifting into automation-heavy roles with strong Selenium and Python skills accelerates salary growth significantly. Eligible programme levels: UG, PG.

domain_skills.skill_name: SLO and SLI Definition and Management

compiled.ai_exposure_detail: GitHub Copilot and ChatGPT assist in writing runbooks, Kubernetes operators, and alerting rule configurations. Amazon Q Developer helps with AWS-specific reliability automation scripts. AI-powered observability tools like Datadog increasingly surface anomaly correlations and predicted failure modes, augmenting on-call engineer workflows.
compiled.human_value_tasks: SREs make high-stakes incident response decisions under pressure — rolling back deployments, escalating to engineering teams, and communicating status to leadership — requiring judgement that AI cannot provide in real time. They define and negotiate SLOs with product and engineering teams, balancing reliability goals with velocity, requiring relationship and communication skills. Chaos engineering experiments require careful planning and human oversight to avoid unintended production impact.
compiled.narrative_para1: A junior Site Reliability Engineer at an Indian product company spends their week maintaining observability infrastructure using Prometheus, Grafana, and Datadog, writing and updating runbooks for common failure scenarios, and participating in on-call rotations to respond to production incidents. Daily tasks include improving alerting signal-to-noise ratios, writing Kubernetes operators for automated remediation, conducting post-incident reviews, and building reliability automation scripts in Python. They work closely with development teams to define and track SLOs, identify error budgets, and prioritise reliability improvements against new feature work. Indian product companies with large consumer bases — payments, e-commerce, edtech — demand SREs who can maintain 99.9%+ uptime across services handling millions of concurrent users.
compiled.narrative_para2: With 50% AI exposure, this role is actively AI-Evolving. GitHub Copilot and ChatGPT assist in writing runbooks, Kubernetes operators, and alerting rule configurations. Amazon Q Developer helps with AWS-specific reliability automation scripts. AI-powered observability tools like Datadog increasingly surface anomaly correlations and predicted failure modes, augmenting on-call engineer workflows. However, sREs make high-stakes incident response decisions under pressure — rolling back deployments, escalating to engineering teams, and communicating status to leadership — requiring judgement that AI cannot provide in real time. They define and negotiate SLOs with product and engineering teams, balancing reliability goals with velocity, requiring relationship and communication skills. Chaos engineering experiments require careful planning and human oversight. The tools currently reshaping this role include GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, and Amazon Q Developer (formerly AWS CodeWhisperer) — each accelerating routine work while leaving the most complex, context-dependent decisions firmly in human hands.
compiled.narrative_para3: B.Tech or MCA graduates with strong Linux, Python, and distributed systems knowledge are the core fit — typically entering after 1-2 years as a DevOps or backend engineer. Those who thrive under pressure, enjoy systematic root cause analysis, and can communicate clearly during high-stakes incidents will excel. Starting at Rs.6-10 lakh, salaries grow to Rs.12-20 lakh at 2-3 years, Rs.20-35 lakh at senior SRE level, and Rs.35-70 lakh (VERIFY) for staff SRE roles. AWS/GCP Professional certifications and Kubernetes expertise (CKA) are strong differentiators. Eligible programme levels: UG, PG.

compiled.human_value_tasks: Software developers make architectural decisions, define abstractions, and design systems that meet complex, evolving business requirements — tasks requiring contextual judgement and experience. They debug intricate production issues involving concurrency, distributed systems, or data corruption where AI lacks sufficient context. Code review, mentoring junior developers, and aligning technical solutions to product goals demand human communication and accountability.
compiled.narrative_para1: A junior Software Developer at an Indian tech company or product startup spends their week writing and reviewing code in Python, Java, or JavaScript, fixing bugs raised on Jira, and attending daily standups in an Agile sprint. Daily tasks include building REST APIs, writing unit tests, peer reviewing pull requests on GitHub, and deploying code through Jenkins or GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines. They work within version control workflows, follow coding standards, and coordinate with QA engineers before releases. In Indian service companies, they may work on client-facing modules requiring VAPT compliance; in product startups, they work directly on the core product codebase with faster iteration cycles.
compiled.narrative_para2: With 55% AI exposure, this role is actively AI-Evolving. GitHub Copilot and Tabnine assist with code completion, boilerplate generation, and unit test scaffolding, covering a significant portion of routine coding tasks. ChatGPT and Claude are used for debugging assistance, code explanation, and generating first-draft implementations. AI accelerates repetitive development tasks but requires human review for correctness, security, and architectural fit. However, software developers make architectural decisions, define abstractions, and design systems that meet complex, evolving business requirements. They debug intricate production issues involving concurrency, distributed systems, or data corruption where AI lacks sufficient context. Code review, mentoring junior developers, and aligning technical solutions to product goals demand human communication and accountability. The tools currently reshaping this role include GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, and Tabnine — each accelerating routine work while leaving the most complex, context-dependent decisions firmly in human hands.
compiled.narrative_para3: B.Tech, B.Sc (CS), MCA, or M.Tech graduates are the core fit. Those with strong problem-solving instincts, comfort with reading documentation, and the ability to break complex requirements into working code will thrive. Starting salaries of Rs.3.5-6 lakh grow to Rs.7-12 lakh at 2-3 years, Rs.12-20 lakh at senior developer level, and Rs.20-40 lakh for tech leads and architects. DSA (Data Structures and Algorithms) proficiency is the most critical hiring filter. Open source contributions and strong GitHub profiles accelerate progression. Eligible programme levels: UG, PG.
